name: Reroots AI
description: AI skincare advisor for beauty and skincare brands. Provides personalized product recommendations, skin analysis, order management, and customer support.

authentication.instructions: Contact Reroots Aesthetics to obtain API credentials

skills.name: Skincare Advice
skills.description: Provides personalized skincare recommendations based on skin type, concerns, and goals
examples: What products do you recommend for dry, sensitive skin?
I have acne-prone skin with hyperpigmentation. What should I use?
Can you create a morning skincare routine for me?

skills.name: Skin Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes skin photos to identify skin type, concerns, and recommend products
examples: Analyze this photo of my skin
What skin concerns do you see in this image?

skills.name: Order Management
skills.description: Checks order status, shipping tracking, and handles order-related inquiries
examples: Can you check the status of order #12345?

skills.name: Inventory Check
skills.description: Checks product availability and stock levels
examples: Do you have the ARC Serum available?

skills.name: Product Information
skills.description: Provides detailed information about skincare products including ingredients, usage, and benefits
examples: What are the ingredients in AURA-GEN?
How do I use the TXA Serum?
What are the benefits of PDRN?

skills.name: Supplier Reorder
skills.description: Places reorder requests with suppliers when stock is low (B2B)
